The highest efficiency is usually achieved with materials that minimize absorption and reflection losses.

The correct answer is D: 90-95% of incident light, reflecting the nearly perfect transmission characteristics expected from such specialized optical components designed to maintain clarity and reduce distortion during critical visual assessments.
